falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a 12% increase from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward breakout would contradict the 'bottom' pattern similarity and invalidate the HOLD signal by indicating a bullish trend reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: Bitcoin's 20-day moving average crosses above $75,000 with a volume surge exceeding 200k BTC/day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a blowoff top pattern rather than a bottom, directly contradicting the 76% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX index drops below 12 (its lowest level since 2020) while the S&P 500 remains above 5,100
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such extreme low volatility combined with sustained price strength would falsify the 'unknown' verdict by confirming a clear bullish trend

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
